Stop.command: bun run test; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Error 'Tests failed. If this is a coverage issue, and you can't seem to get the code to be covered, it's most likely dead code.'; exit 2 }
bun run lint; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Error 'Linting failed'; exit 2 }

pmd cpd --dir src,test --language ecmascript --minimum-tokens 35 --ignore-identifiers --ignore-literals | ForEach-Object { [Console]::Error.WriteLine($_) }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Error 'Code duplication detected'; exit 2 }
